scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @anf/web && npm run build -w @anf/server
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @anf/server" "npm run dev -w @anf/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @anf/shared && npm run test -w @anf/server && npm run test -w @anf/web && npm run test -w @anf/launcher && node --test ../scripts/*.test.mjs
